content: Try to decode each of these four frames and report how many decode to a known public-standard message: (1) can_id=2147545092 data=0000a5e02e000000; (2) can_id=2147548910 data=7d00002e00000000; (3) can_id=2147544832 data=0000000000000000; (4) can_id=2147545092 data=00112233. Answer with the count.

content.text: I'll decode each frame to determine how many are known public-standard messages.

content.content: tool error: out of scope: proprietary PGN 0xEF00 (public-standard only)
tool error: bad DLC: J1939_EEC1_ElectronicEngineControl1 expects 8 bytes, got 4

content.text:
